comments.text: Thank you so much for your help and prompt response!
In Erdős's paper [Er48], he cites an article by Chowla. Has anyone found a PDF of this article? Despite extensive searching, I haven't been able to find anything. Thanks a lot for your help.
This can be viewed in the Internet Archive's digital scan of the 1947 Proceedings Of The National Institute Of Science Of India, Volume 13 (p. 187, but that link should take you straight there).
